THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOBBA, ROBERTA E. AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILL, VIRGINIA ALL PERSONS CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE 1039 HUDSON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO SEE SCANNED DOC - PLAINTIFF IS DECLARED THE RIGHTFUL FEE SIMPLE OWNER OF ALL RIGHT, TITLE AND INTEREST IN AND TO THAT REAL PROPERTY COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1039 HUDSON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124. APN 4647A-012. NO OTHER PERSON OR ENTITY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO ANY HEIR OR DEVISEE OF VIRGINIA C. HENRY, HAS ANY RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE OR INTEREST IN OR LIEN ON THE DESCRIBED REAL PROPERTY, WHOSE LEGAL DISCRIPTION IS SET FORTH IN ATTACHMENT 7 TO THE JUDGMENT.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Continued

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Roberta E. Bobba, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by respondents Virginia C. Henry or all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title estate, lien or interest in the 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, California to plaintiff's title, or any cloud on plaintiff's title thereto.
Plaintiff's complaint for quiet title was filed on January 18, 2018.
Defendant Virgina Dill's answer disclaiming interest forever in the subject property, located at 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, CA, was filed on January 29, 2018.
Order granting ex parte request to service summons by publication was filed on April 30, 2018.
Proof of Publication of Summons as to all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title estate, lien or interest in the 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, California to plaintiff's title, or any cloud on plaintiff's title thereto, was filed on May 30, 2018.
Default as to defendants all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title estate, lien or interest in the 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, California to plaintiff's title, or any cloud on plaintiff's title thereto, was entered on July 12, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 12, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, July 31, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Roberta E. Boba, an individual, and against the Defendants Virginia Dill, a natural person, and all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title estate, lien or interest in the 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, California to plaintiff's title, or any cloud on plaintiff's title thereto, as follows:

Plaintiff is declared the rightful fee simple owner of all right, title and interest in and to that real property commonly known as 1039 Hudson Street, San Francisco, CA 94124. No other person or entity has any right, title, estate or interest in or lien on the described real property, whose legal discription is set forth in Attachment 7 to the Judgment.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
